svg.title: flowchart
svg.desc:
flowchart TD subgraph INTAKE ["Phase 1 — Application Intake"] A([Vendor Application Received]) B[Submit Registration Form] C[Receive and Store Documents] D{Duplicate Vendor?} REJ1([Duplicate Rejected]) end
subgraph DOCVAL ["Phase 2 — AI Document Validation"] F["AI Document Intelligence Agent"] G{Documents Valid?} H[Notify

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;color:#1A2B3C !important;fill:#1A2B3C !important
